My Story

Dedicated to growing your e-commerce revenue

I'm Emelobi Growth — a Shopify developer and digital marketing expert with 4+ years helping entrepreneurs and brands build high-performing online stores. My work sits at the intersection of design, data, and marketing.

I've worked with 120+ store owners — from complete beginners launching their first store to established brands scaling aggressively. Whether the challenge is low traffic, poor conversions, or a weak brand presence, I diagnose and fix it.

My approach: understand your goals, audit what's broken, execute what works, and measure everything.

Shopify Development WordPress & WooCommerce SEO & CRO Paid Ads Email Marketing Graphic Design
How I Work

My approach

Results First

Every strategy tied to a measurable outcome — traffic, conversions, retention.

Continuous Optimization

I use data and testing to keep your store ahead of competitors.

Transparent Partnership

You'll always know what's being done, why, and what results to expect.

Speed & Reliability

Fast turnarounds and on-time delivery — every single time.

Ready to work together?

Let's map out your store's path to growth with a free strategy call.

Services
What I Offer

Services built for e-commerce growth

Every service designed around one goal: growing your store's revenue through strategy, design, and data.

01

Shopify Store Design & Optimization

I design and build custom Shopify stores that are fast, mobile-first, and built to convert. Theme customization, app integrations, checkout UX, and ongoing performance optimization.

Custom ThemesSpeed OptimizationApp Integration
02

SEO Optimization

Comprehensive SEO strategies driving consistent organic traffic — keyword research, on-page optimization, technical SEO audits, site structure, and local SEO.

On-Page SEOTechnical SEOLocal SEO
03

CRO — Conversion Rate Optimization

Identify what's stopping visitors from buying through heatmap analysis, A/B testing, and funnel audits. Turn browsers into buyers without more ad spend.

A/B TestingFunnel AuditUX Improvements
04

Email Marketing

Automated flows — welcome sequences, abandoned cart recovery, post-purchase, win-back campaigns — generating revenue 24/7 in Klaviyo or Mailchimp.

Klaviyo / MailchimpAutomationsCart Recovery
05

Paid Advertising

Profitable Meta & Google ad campaigns built around clean tracking and creative that converts. Audience research, pixel setup, retargeting, and ongoing optimization.

Meta AdsGoogle AdsRetargeting
06

Branding & Graphic Design

Professional brand identities, product banners, social media creatives, and ad creatives — visually compelling, on-brand, and designed to convert.

Brand IdentitySocial CreativesAd Creatives
UGC & Video Content

User-Generated Content that converts

UGC videos are the most trusted form of social proof in 2026. Real customers, real results — I produce, source, and deploy UGC video ads that cut ad costs and boost conversion rates.

UGC Product Review
60-sec conversion ad
